# designlang Chrome extension — privacy policy

The designlang browser popup does **not** collect, store, or transmit any personal data.

## What the extension accesses

- `activeTab` — the URL of the currently active tab, only while the popup is open, used to prefill the hosted extractor input field at `https://designlang.manavaryasingh.com`.

## What the extension does not do

- No analytics.
- No remote tracking scripts.
- No background service workers.
- No sending of browsing history, form data, or cookies anywhere.
- No storage of the URL after the popup closes.

The only network request that may originate from interacting with the extension is the user's own decision to follow the link to `designlang.manavaryasingh.com` or copy the CLI command. Any extraction performed on that website is subject to the website's own privacy policy.

## Contact

Questions: https://github.com/Manavarya09/design-extract/issues
